no: Makes BG1 NPCs (Kivan, Xan) continuous across SoD and BG2 in EET. By morpheus562. v1.0. EET only (REQUIRE_PREDICATE). Kivan has Archer kit option and optional timed quest removal

conflicts.reason: Both add Kivan to BG2 via pdialog.2da/interdia.2da APPEND. Cannot have two Kivan entries. Choose one: Continuous NPCs (lightweight continuation) or Kivan of Shilmista (full NPC with romance/quests)
conflicts.myComps: #701 Add Kivan Archer / #702 Add Kivan No Kit

conflicts.reason: Both add Xan to BG2 via pdialog.2da/interdia.2da APPEND. Cannot have two Xan entries. Choose one: Continuous NPCs (lightweight continuation) or Xan NPC (full NPC with dialogue/quests)
conflicts.myComps: #900 Add Xan to SoD and BG2

sum: Allows NPC companions who only appear in Baldur's Gate 1 to continue into Siege of Dragonspear and Baldur's Gate 2 with their developed stats and abilities intact.

co.scn: Add Kivan to SoD and BG2
co.no: Adds Kivan to SoD and BG2 with Archer kit. EET only. Requires BG1 Kivan to have been in party.

co.scn: Add Kivan to SoD and BG2
co.no: Adds Kivan to SoD and BG2 keeping his original class. EET only.
Removes the time limit on Kivan's revenge quest. Requires Kivan added (cn:701 or cn:702).
Increases Kivan's stats for BG2 competitiveness. Requires Kivan added (cn:701 or cn:702).

co.n: Add Xan to SoD and BG2
co.no: Adds Xan as continuous NPC across SoD and BG2. EET only. Independent of Kivan components.
co.tp2n: Add Xan to SoD and BG2
